name: Mezzanine Deck
status: DRAFT - placeholder dimensions; confirm with Mike.

params.desc: Deck top surface height above floor (Z).

geometry.note: Posts grid (cols x rows) floor->deck underside; deck slab on top.
geometry.frame: Datum = pose {position,yaw} at base centre; local X = width, Y = depth, Z up.
geometry.deck: slab of deck.thickness with top at deck.height; posts at a cols x rows grid spanning the footprint.

connectionPoints.desc: Deck top surface - a level the platform can run on.

meta.author: component-authoring session (parallel)
meta.remainingAssumptions: deck.thickness, post.section, post grid, handrails, stairs. Appearance to be revisited.
